summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Hireabble (rebranded from JobSwipe) with new onboarding flow and recruiter job editing features. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (25/25 tests). Frontend workflows including registration, onboarding, and dashboard functionality working correctly with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Experience Level dropdown option 'Senior' not clickable due to overlay/timing issue

passed_tests: Backend: 25/25 API endpoint tests including new onboarding status validation
Backend: Job creation, editing (PUT /jobs/{id}), and deletion functionality
Backend: Candidate profile fields validation (title, experience, school, degree)
Frontend: Landing page displays 'Hireabble' branding correctly
Frontend: Job seeker registration and automatic redirect to onboarding
Frontend: Complete 7-step onboarding flow (photo, role, experience, employment, education, skills, preferences)
Frontend: Recruiter registration bypasses onboarding, goes straight to dashboard
Frontend: Recruiter dashboard loads with job posting functionality
Frontend: Job posting modal opens and form fields work correctly
User authentication and JWT token handling across all workflows
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown interaction issue in job posting modal - Experience Level 'Senior' option not clickable. May need to add proper wait times or adjust z-index for dropdown options.
